title: WIP limit in status column (Kanban)
excerpt:
Hello! 
Excellent product, congratulations. Is there a particular way to add a WIP limit to the Kanban columns? I couldn’t find anything related here nor in Google, and it’s a key feature, in my opinion. 
Best. 
Alex

posts.author: alexhermida (Alex Hermida)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Excellent product, congratulations. Is there a particular way to add a WIP limit to the Kanban columns? I couldn’t find anything related here nor in Google, and it’s a key feature, in my opinion.

Best.

Alex

posts.author: Scragemi (Emily Scragg)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you mean limit the amount of WIP that can be assigned to each person each week? That is available via the Workload view (would be good to have that as a standard on each board).

posts.author: Holly (Holly)
posts.cookedHtml:
For me, this would be how much work could be assigned to each column (status) in the kanban view. WIP is a core principal of kanban boards.

Even if you could have the option to show the wip limit at the top - this would be a big help. As it is now, I’m having to change the names of the statuses.

posts.author: giacomo.bermudez (Giacomo Bermudez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Holly, I’m having the same issue here, did you find a solution to the WIP limits in the kanban view?

posts.author: Holly (Holly)
posts.cookedHtml: No, only to tag it into the title of the column, but doesn’t work great.

posts.author: giacomo.bermudez (Giacomo Bermudez)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your reply Holly, let’s hope monday adds this useful feature! Have a good one

posts.author: Steve-Fenton (Steve Fenton)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is now a feature in Monday that lets you set a WIP limit on the column.

On the Kanban board:

  • Click the “…” menu
  • Select “Set column limit”
  • Enter the number to limit the column

The limit only applies to the column on the specific view you add it. This is great because for the “My tasks” view you can have a limit of 1 and it doesn’t effect other views for the whole team (and other combinations you can think of). I know I used individual WIP in this example, but if we’re a collaborating team, we have team WIP limits, or we start from the right Individual WIP limits is a “coping strategy”.
